slides.headline:
Meet you where you are.
Move you where you need to go.
slides.subhead: One workflow at a time — understand, diagnose, enhance, reinvent. You stay in the lead until the system earns the right to run on its own.

slides.eyebrow: The Journey · How we land and expand
slides.headline: The journey is the wedge.
Capture
slides.body: Your team works as normal. We record what happens, redact what's sensitive locally, and distill it into the decision graph that becomes your engine.

slides.headline: Record locally. Distill once. Fan out to graph and backtest.

slides.callout: L1 · L2 · everything stays local through redaction — only the distilled graph and backtest store ever persist

slides.headline: Workflow capture in action.
slides.caption: The pipeline records an operator working, redacts PHI locally, distills the recording via Whisper, and writes a multi-hop decision trace back to the graph — without sensitive data leaving the environment.
slides.video_label: Capture pipeline demo — workflow recording → graph

slides.headline: From a screen recording to a structured workflow.
slides.caption: The pipeline reconstructs the workflow step by step from the recording, then distills each segment's transcript into typed, evidence-backed observations — the raw material the graph is built from.

frames.label: Workflow draft map · reconstructed from the recording, step by step
Segment-level · transcript distilled into structured observations

slides.headline: Tribal knowledge becomes a queryable engine.
slides.body: Every workflow your team runs becomes a typed, traversable trace on your intelligence graph — the seed everything else compounds on.
bullets: Works on day one — no process change required
PHI redaction happens locally; nothing sensitive leaves
Each capture deepens L2: ontology, entity resolution, bi-temporal trace
The graph you build in Capture funds everything in Diagnose

slides.headline: Diagnose
slides.body: You may already have workflows captured — or we connect directly to your data warehouse. Either way, we backtest your history and price what you missed.

slides.headline: One pull, fanned across the engine — converged into a priced opportunity.

slides.callout: L2 · L3 · the backtest runs your history against the intelligence graph and converges on a single priced number

slides.headline: The backtest: what you missed, priced.
slides.caption: Connect the warehouse, seed the engine, and generate a stack-ranked worklist of recoverable value — quantified against your actual history.
slides.video_label: Diagnose demo — data connect → backtest → priced worklist

slides.headline: From raw claims to a priced worklist.
slides.caption: The diagnostic reduces operational signal to a stack-ranked list of recoverable value — every finding dollar-attributed and evidence-backed.

frames.label: Raw claims · CARC / RARC codes, underpayment itemized

slides.headline: Enhance
slides.body: The analyst surfaces artifacts. Your team judges them — confirm, edit, resolve. Every judgment writes back to the graph and makes the next one sharper. The loop runs continuously.

slides.headline: The value loop — every judgment regenerates the work and compounds the engine.

slides.callout: ↻ regenerate on every judgment · acceptance ships value, feedback compounds the engine → Reinvent

slides.headline: The analyst worklist — work-finding, live.
slides.caption: The harnessed analyst surfaces prioritized artifacts. Each confirm or resolve writes provenance back to the graph and re-ranks the worklist in real time. The human stays in the lead.
slides.video_label: Enhance demo — analyst worklist → artifact → judgment → graph

slides.headline: Surfaced, judged, resolved — then it compounds.
slides.caption: An always-on worklist of dollar-attributed artifacts. The team reviews evidence, attaches proof, and resolves — and the engine learns from every decision.

frames.label: To review · artifact with evidence + proof-of-resolution
Backtest · the billing problem, traced on the graph
Solved · resolved and resubmitted, payment confirmed

slides.headline: Reinvent
slides.body: The builders compound into agentic flows. The same loop that earned trust now runs self-improving — the workflow starts to fix itself, with your team only on the exceptions.

slides.eyebrow: The Platform · How it fits together
slides.headline: Three layers, one engine — from the inside out.

slides.callout: the engine at the center · ontology types everything in · orchestration backs every surface · MCP interconnects out · nothing leaves the on-prem boundary

slides.headline: One engine, compounding underneath it all.
slides.caption: Every capture, diagnosis, and judgment becomes typed, traversable, provenance-bound nodes — the customer world-model that makes each workflow smarter than the last.

frames.label: The intelligence graph · decisions, activities, entities as nodes
Traversable · scoped by entity, payer, and source

slides.headline: Let's pinpoint the pain — and size the opportunity.
slides.subhead: Pick the workflow that's quietly costing you the most across your stack. We map where the friction lives, size what fixing it is worth, and show exactly where Found enhances it — so the next quarter looks different from the last.
steps: Map the enhance path across your stack
